name: Midnight Diner: Tokyo Stories
overview: Late at night in a tiny Tokyo alley diner, the Master cooks whatever his customers request. Each episode follows a different regular and the story tied to their favourite dish.

name: Samurai Gourmet
overview: A recently retired salaryman rediscovers his appetite for life by visiting restaurants and imagining himself as a fearless samurai warrior who answers to no one.

name: Doctor X: Surgeon Michiko Daimon
overview: An unaffiliated freelance surgeon takes on difficult cases that academic hospitals refuse. Proud, precise, and unyielding, she defies hospital politics with the phrase: 'I never fail.'

name: Hana Yori Dango
overview: A poor but fiercely spirited girl wins a scholarship to an elite high school dominated by four wealthy boys known as the F4. What begins as war becomes an unexpected love story.

name: Unnatural
overview: Forensic pathologists at the Unnatural Death Investigation Institute examine mysterious and unexplained deaths, uncovering the human stories—and hidden crimes—that lie beneath the surface.

name: Ama-chan
overview: A Tokyo teenager moves to her mother's rural hometown on the Sanriku coast and trains as an ama sea-diver, discovering a rich local culture and her own place within a multigenerational family.

name: Oshin
overview: The epic life of a woman born in poverty in 1901 Meiji-era Japan who rises through hardship, war, and loss to build her own business, becoming a symbol of perseverance across generations.

name: Mare
overview: A young woman living on the Noto Peninsula juggles her work at a local inn, her relationships, and her quiet dream of becoming a pastry chef, supported by a warm multigenerational household.

name: The Makanai: Cooking for the Maiko House
overview: In a maiko training house in Kyoto, the girl who cannot master dance discovers her true gift: cooking daily meals that sustain and comfort the young women training to become geisha.

name: Good Morning Call
overview: A cheerful high school girl and the most popular boy at school accidentally end up sharing an apartment, leading to a slow and sweet romance that neither expected.

name: Atelier
overview: An eager young woman joins an elite Tokyo lingerie company and learns the exacting craft of luxury fashion from her demanding boss, growing both professionally and personally.

name: Mother
overview: A schoolteacher discovers that one of her students is suffering abuse at home. Unable to ignore the child's pain, she makes an irreversible decision that will change both their lives forever.

name: Saka no Tochu no Ie
overview: A divorce lawyer going through her own separation moves into a house on a hillside and begins to experience unsettling visions, uncovering the dark history of the women who lived there before her.

name: The Final Table
overview: Twelve teams of two elite chefs compete across international cuisines to earn a seat at a legendary table, judged by respected culinary masters from each featured country.

name: Iron Chef Japan
overview: Legendary master chefs face off in Kitchen Stadium against challengers in battles centered on a secret theme ingredient, judged on taste, presentation, and creativity.

name: The Great British Bake Off
overview: Amateur bakers compete in a white tent on the British countryside, attempting increasingly elaborate pastry, bread, and cake challenges in front of a panel of expert judges.

name: Nagi no Oitama
overview: A famous manga artist returns to her small coastal hometown to care for her ailing father and rediscovers the quiet rhythms of local life, the sea, and a childhood friendship she left behind.

name: Nigehaji
overview: A contract worker and a systems engineer form a marriage of convenience to solve each other's problems: she needs a home, he needs a housekeeper. A thoughtful and funny romance about modern love.

name: Natsume's Book of Friends
overview: A teenage boy who can see spirits inherits a book of names from his grandmother, and embarks on a gentle journey to return those names to the yokai she had bound, making unlikely friends along the way.

name: Camouflage
overview: A veteran detective and an unconventional young officer form an unlikely partnership, using contrasting methods to solve crimes while navigating the personal and professional tensions between them.
